creator: rednyte@rednyte.net
text: I also use the -RELEASE version. Anyways, so I installed the prometheus gem with packages and completed the gitlab-ce update only to have issues generating the assets. I completely uninstalled gitlab-ce, reinstalled and the prometheus gem still wouldn't compile. I was however able to install again using packages, successfully complete the entire update process and run gitlab-ce 16.0.1. I am currently using poudriere to create packagers and it has compiled successfully the compilation of prometheus gem. I'm still not sure why it doesn't build outside of the poudriere environment.
